mapper.update:
update VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectiontimingdata
task_id = #{data.task_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_id = #{data.company_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
time_stamp = #{data.time_stamp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{data.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tran_id = #{data.tran_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{data.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{data.update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
prohibit_time = #{data.prohibit_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cron = #{data.cron,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work_untis_name = #{data.work_untis_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work_untis_code = #{data.work_untis_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{data.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},monitoring_events=null,broadcast_events=null,sending_broadcast_events=null
where id = #{data.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectiontimingdata
task_id = #{data.task_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_id = #{data.company_id2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{data.status2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tran_id = #{data.tran_id2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{data.remark2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{data.update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
prohibit_time = #{data.prohibit_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
work_untis_name = #{data.work_untis_name2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work_untis_code = #{data.work_untis_code2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{data.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},time_stamp=null,cron=null,
monitoring_events = #{data.monitoring_events,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, broadcast_events = #{data.broadcast_events,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sending_broadcast_events = #{data.sending_broadcast_events,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{data.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectiontimingdata set status=#{map.status} where id=#{map.id}
mapper.select:
select * from VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectiontimingdata where work_untis_code=#{map.work_untis_code}
and work_untis_code!=#{map.old_name_code}
